# so_ase.plotting_maps

### Functions

| [`circular_shape`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.plotting_maps.circular_shape)(ax)                         | Clips the plotting area to a circular shape, typically used to create polar plots or maps with circular boundaries.   |
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [`create_map`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.plotting_maps.create_map)(ax[, extent, land, coastline, ...]) | Creates a map with optional land and coastline features, gridlines.                                                   |
